name: rung_99_spacing_max_english_directional_stress
utterances: Cy has Bo as a parent.
Eli has Di as a parent.
Gus has Fay as a parent.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
I might have phrased one relation backwards; retract this if it exists: parent(cy, bo).
And retract this too if it exists: parent(di, cy).
Is Ari an ancestor of Eli?
Is Fay an ancestor of Gus?
